message.content:
@startuml
title Send file to inbox

actor User
participant REST
participant "Lookup Service" as LS
participant "VFS Service" as VFS
participant "Storage Service" as SS
participant S3

User -> REST : get User2 inbox info 🔑(login/password)
REST --> User : User2 🔑**public key** and /**inbox** access creds
User -> SS : encrypt and save file to user's inbox location
SS -> S3 : persistence
S3 --> SS : success
SS --> User : success

@enduml
